!

!

!

!

!

!

 High?

 Monkey D.

 Roar, Secret Superspeed Mecha I'm gonna be the Pirate King!

 I wanna talk about Nico Robin.

 Did that woman change after you guys came to this town?



 Yes, suddenly.



 After she went out to town, she suddenly disappeared,



 and by this morning, she was the suspect of your attempted assassination.

 she said she would no longer come back to us.

 in order to ask her directly again why she's leaving the ship.

 CP ...



 The Government's operation was already in progress.

 I want you to know that Nico Robin and I both have a means



 to bring back the ancient w*apon that could destroy the world.



 Destroy the world?

 A problem occurred in our plan.



 Everyone, come to the bedroom right away.

 The blueprints you guys were after are fakes.

 But if you're sniffing around the Poneglyphs on another front



 and helping the Government as well,



 then I have to stop you right here, right now.



 I'm not seeking the Poneglyphs in order to bring the w*apon back.



 I just want to know the history, that's all.



 Such a claim doesn't mean anything!



 I told you, didn't I?



 Over... and over again...



 Even if you don't intend to do so...



 Weapons hurt people despite your intentions!



 They can even hurt those who mean a lot to you!



 That which hurts people doesn't necessarily have malicious intent.



 If that simple curiosity of wanting to know the history



 leads to the destruction of the world,



 you should die right here, right now, Nico Robin!



 Even after you saw the Ohara devils' fate,



 you still want to chase after the world's history?!



 Don't talk like you know everything about Ohara!



 You don't even know how much the World Government messed up my life!



 If you hate the Government that much, then why are you helping them?!



 Because I have a wish I want to come true even if I have to give up everything.



 There're two conditions that CP  forced on me in this town.



 One is to pin the assassination on the Straw Hats.



 The other is to turn myself in to the Government and obey them.



 If you do that, you'll die, too.



 Why do you accept such conditions after evading them for    years?



 In this lone instance, CP  has been given permission



 to exercise Buster Call against the Straw Hats.



 Buster Call?



 It's an emergency order to summon five of the vice admirals



 from Navy Headquarters and ten battleships to one place.



 Once you've been targeted by the national w*r-class military power,



 nothing will remain of you.



 Normally, in the Navy, this authority only belongs to the three admirals



 and the head of the Navy, the fleet admiral.



 But this time,



 through the admiral Aokiji,



 CP  was given the authority to exercise it just this once.



 If I didn't accept the conditions, Buster Call was going to be exercised on us.



 When I heard the name Aokiji, I gave up.



 I was always able to make good my escape for the past    years



 because I had nothing to protect...



 Because I could betray people and use them as a shield.



 But I really can't do that any longer.



 The life I once gave up on...



 The heart that I lost...



 The dream I could no longer have... They picked them all up for me.



 I was able to make friends who would believe in someone like me.



 Then, your wish is...



 That the six Straw Hats, excluding me, can leave this island safely!



 Are you saying, for that, you don't care if the w*apon is brought back?!



 You don't care what happens to the world?!



 That's right. I don't!



 Enough of that nonsense!



 I couldn't pull the trigger.



 Of all people,



 over the lives of everyone in this world,



 she chose the lives of the six of you.



 It was for us...



 Now that I might have the w*apon's blueprints taken away by them,



 I don't have the right to criticize her, though.



 Hey! What's wrong?!



 Good...



 So Robin didn't betray us after all.



 I'd better gather everyone immediately and let them know!



 Thanks, Iceberg-san!



 Wait! Straw Hat and the others were beaten!



 What do you think you can do now?!



 "Now"?!



 It starts now! Luffy and the others are fine.

 We're gonna get Robin back!



 When unsure, anyone can be weak.



 There's no limit to their strength when they know it's okay to save her!



 Chopper! Chopper!

 Chopper! Hey, wake up!

 Wake up! Chopper!



 Chopper...

 Chopper...



 Hm?

 please board from the second floor lobby due to the raised water level.



 --Okay, let's go check them out! --Yeah!

comment:

 Partisan!

 Friends?

 Ice Time.

 somewhere at sea, Robin!

 --Hey! --Hm?

    million Berries?!

 Ohara?

 Robin...



 Robin-chan...



 Robin...

 Sogeking.

 Robin...



 Robin!

link: 09x291 - Boss Luffy Returns! Is It a Dream or Reality? Lottery Ruckus!
comment:

 My treasure? If you want it, you can have it!

 ONE PIECE!

 When it comes to personal storms,



 simply ride aboard someone else’s biorhythm



 and pretend it isn’t there!



 We’re going to gather up all our dreams



 and set out in search of something to find

 We are!

 This is Grand Jipang.

 Although there were some troubles last year

 However...



 Idiot! Watch where you're going!



 Ouch! You're the ones who bumped into me!

 Boss. Where's your payment?

 Okay!



 Straw Hat again?

 Arrrgh! How irritating!



 Ever since we came to this town, our earnings have dropped considerably!



 Then we should go to a different town.

 Hey!



 Orika! How's he doing?

 Orika, Pepper and the others are worried about you.

 Well, but...

 Yeah... Yeah... Okay.



 Pops tells me to go, too.



 Good.

 ♪ It's warm on the southern islands! ♪

 Yeah!



 ♪ It's cold on the northern islands! ♪

 But...

 Hm?

 Dr. Bluenose isn't around when we need him.

 Boss!

 Orika took him in and is nursing him.



 Orika is?!

 At my house...



 Hey, walk briskly!

 Pops!

 No!

 Well, I suppose they are in a way.



 The zombies were originally animated thanks to a Devil Fruit.



 Salt holds the power of the ocean.



 So just as a power holder grows limp in the ocean,



 the salt breaks the fusion between a fake soul and a body.



 Makes sense! So that monkey spewed out the shadow that was inside of him, right?



 That never would have occurred to me.



 To reiterate, please stuff salt into a zombie's mouth to defeat it!



 That's the trick! Even for this bag of bones, that's a snap!



 --Snap! Snap! Snap! --But Brook...



 Why are you so knowledgeable about the zombies and this island?



 That has to do with when I lost my shadow five years ago...



 Naturally, they sent me back out to drift at sea.



 Fortunately, I was able to turn back by the time I awoke.



 And thus I returned to the island and fought.



 I faced the zombie who holds my shadow!



 But in the end, I lost miserably.



 I fled for fear of my life.



 No matter what...



 No matter what, I did not want to die!



 I am the sole survivor from my ship!



 Someday I must pull out of the Devil's Sea



 and carry out the promise I made to my friends!



 So I ran for my life!



 But ultimately, extending my life did not resolve anything.



 So I am done running!



 Until I defeat that man and recover my--



 Well, you'll have to pardon me.



 I'm in a hurry. Take care!



 Stop right there!



 On top of everything you've told us, answer this one question before you go.



 The Humming...! Grah, the Humming Swordsman!



 Damn it! He's the only person to have figured out my zombies' weakness!



 Huh? Huh? How did he figure it out in the first place?



 What is she doing?



 And how did he come back--



 Hey, Cindry-chan! Why do you keep standing in front of me?!



 Humming Swordsman...



 I've heard about him, but what is he like?



 Perona! Don't you know what he looks like?



 That would explain how he slipped through your recon.



 So it would seem.



 Master, the seed of trouble has returned to our island.



 That's none of my concern, simpleton!



 You can deal with him!



 H-Hey!



 Sorry for the wait!



 Now then, let's go to the freezer!



 It's freezing!



 Sir...! The present condition is such...



 Stupid! You should have mentioned that first!



 If that's the case, he should buy us plenty of time.



 Sir!



 Come report to me if there are any other problems.



 Now go toss Straw Hat out!



 Roger!



 Ready, go! Heave, ho! Heave, ho! Heave, ho!



 Heave, ho! Heave, ho! Heave, ho! Heave, ho! Heave, ho!



 --Luffy! --Stupid! Don't pop out!



 He won't die just because they took his shadow!



 Remember Brook!



 Uh huh...



 Kumacy, hurry it up!



 Coming!



 We can't leave now! Let's bide our time.



 They're going to do something with Luffy's shadow.



 We gotta find out what!



 We can worry about recovering it later!



 That duo is long gone.



 Where did they go?



 I never expected them to defeat Tararan!



 Whoa, there!



 Oh, here's the spot!



 Jeez! Did you get lost, Jigoro?



 Off my back! Now where are my foes?!



 Let me face them now! Give me enemies!



 Franky...



 What is it, punk? I'm not crying, you dummy!



 Don't look at me!



 What compelled you... to ask him that?



 Shut up! I can ask whatever I want!



 Gosh darn it! I freaking love that skeleton!



 You'll never find a better guy!



 Darn it all!



 You sure won't.



 They really are scary!



 Th-The Humming Swordsman... is terrifying!



 I was so scared...



 But I won't give up!



 I will never, ever give up!



 Never!



 I will recover my shadow!



 I can't wait!



 When I saw his corpse in the Land of Ice, my body wouldn't stop trembling.



 It's breathtaking when you think that this terrifying beast



 used to terrorize the seas     years ago!



 --Cold! --When he conquered a nation, he'd carry the entire island back to his domain.



 It's said he created a kingdom of thugs.



 I was so close to the famous giant known as the legendary "Continent Puller."



 I-I'm freezing!



 Where the heck are they going?



 Beats me, but I think they said something about a special freezer...



 That explains it!



 The Land of Ice? A corpse?



 I never dreamed I'd get to see that legend with my own two eyes!



 This is a zombie creator's--



 Hey, Cindry-chan! Why are you walking in front of me?



 Yet another legend shall come back to life!



 Long time no see, No.    .



 Now, it's time for him to awaken!



 He is the only berserker to have gone down in history as a "Devil."



 Oars!



 What's going on? They put Luffy's shadow in that giant!



 We've finally uncovered the secret behind the zombies.



 Ouch! Let go! What's your problem?



 Nami, what's wrong?



 It's that invisible man again!



 Nami, you're... vanishing!



 Wh-Why...?



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "Awakening After     Years!! Oars Opens His Eyes!!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 10x351 - Awakening After 500 Years!! Oars Opens His Eyes!!
comment:
Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 We've left the established course



 Right now, we're rowing straight toward



 The borderline between the sky and the ocean



 In the dark depths of the ocean, adventure holds its breath



 Don't you have a good time just imagining it?



 Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 "That feeling" I get when embarking



 Is something I hope to remember always



 If I can, I won't be afraid of anything



 With our pulses racing, let's go on a trip now



 Shy hearts engrave the rhythm of adventure



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Life is "Adventurous"



 Be aware it's "Dangerous"



 Who's gonna be "One of us"



 And a trip goes on because



 We da pirate of the "Mass"



 To the West, To the East



 Gotta find my way, Sail away



 All the way to "One piece"!!



 Stuff a dream into your empty chest



 And spread your wings



 If the wind blowing through them dyes your heart



 Let's press forward



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Wealth, fame, power...



 Gold Roger, the King of the Pirates,



 once attained everything this world has to offer.



 The words he uttered just before his death



 drove people around the world to the seas.



 My treasure? If you want it, you can have it!



 Find it! I left everything this world has to offer there!



 And so men rushed onto the Grand Line in pursuit of romanticism!



 The world has truly entered a Great Pirate Era!



 This shadow will bring me one step closer



 to becoming the King of the Pirates, Hogback!



 It's been a decade since we first met.



 I put all of my prowess into creating No.     for a day such as this!



 With that shadow in it,



 I'm certain it'll become the most powerful zombie in history!



 It will be a great asset!



 The day I become the world's "King of the Grave" is close at hand!



 I can practically see the day I turn the cute critters of the world



 into zombies and make them serve me in my dream kingdom.



 Heave, ho! Heave, ho! Heave, ho! Heave, ho! Heave, ho!



 --Luffy! --Stupid! Don't pop out!



 He won't die just because they took his shadow!



 Remember Brook!



 Uh-huh...



 Here, guys, take this.



 What is it?



 The zombies' weakness!



 This is their weakness? What exactly is it?



 It's salt.



 To reiterate, please stuff salt into a zombie's mouth to defeat it!



 That's the trick! Even for this bag of bones, that's a snap!



 --Snap! Snap! Snap! --But Brook...



 Why are you so knowledgeable about the zombies and this island?



 That has to do with when I lost my shadow five years ago...



 Naturally, they sent me back out to drift at sea.



 Fortunately, I was able to turn back by the time I awoke.



 And thus I returned to the island and fought.



 But in the end, I lost miserably.



 Well, you'll have to pardon me.



 I'm in a hurry. Take care!



 Stop right there!



 On top of everything you've told us, answer this one question before you go.



 I can't wait!



 When I saw his corpse in the Land of Ice, my body wouldn't stop trembling.



 I had never dreamed I'd get to see that legend with my own two eyes!



 This is a zombie creator's--



 Hey, Cindry-chan! Why are you walking in front of me?



 Yet another legend shall come back to life!



 Long time no see, No.    .



 Now, it's time for him to awaken!



 He is the only berserker to have gone down in history as a "Devil."



 Oars!



 "Awakening After     Years!! Oars Opens His Eyes!!"



 Let's get this underway!



 What is that? A-A giant's... corpse?



 Even for a giant, it's freaking huge!



 Don't make a sound, Chopper!



 Be still, Straw Hat Luffy's shadow!



 I am your new master.



 I'm about to provide you with a voice and body



 so that you may live as a zombie.



 Forget all of your past relations and become my obedient soldier!



 We have a deal!



 Wha...?



 We should have made Cindry-chan agree to forget her past, too.



 Then I'd actually get to eat on plates.



 I wish I could break your knee caps like plates.



 Yikes! Cindry-chan, that threat was super scary!



 Cindry doesn't show Hogback any mercy, does she?



 That was a Hog-smackdown...



 Huh?



 It's time! Awaken!



 L-Luffy's shadow...!



 Arise from     years of slumber!



 Wh-What's happening?



 Luffy's shadow...!



 It went in!



 No! Don't scream!



 The corpse moved!



 Who are they?



 C-C-Crap! They found us!



 I screamed out!



 A demon has awoken!



 Hey, Kumacy! Don't tell me you've been sheltering the pirates!



 My bride! What are you doing down here?



 We won't let you escape!



 Magnificent!



 How truly overawing! He's a piece of art! A real devil!



 Meat!



 Wh-What was that?



 I'm hungry!



 Kumacy, don't let go of me!



 --Okay! --What?!



 --Now zoom! --Yep! --Uh-huh!



 Hey! Where are the pirates? Where did my bride go?



 They ran as fast as their legs could carry them!



 Boy, can they run!



 Tch! I won't let them escape!



 Sanji, feed me!



 Huh? Sanji? Who's that?



 What was that? What did we just witness?



 The corpse started to move after he inserted Luffy's shadow!



 That's the deal behind these zombies.



 This is how Dr. Hogback brings people back to life...



 That huge creep's ability probably stems from...



 ...a Devil Fruit!



 Considering the first word out of his mouth was "meat"...



 ...that monstrous giant clearly has Luffy's personality, huh?



 --Yeah... --Then think back!



 We ran into a penguin in the breezeway who resembled Sanji-kun.



 I won't kick a woman...



 ...even if it kills me!



 Oh, yeah! So does that mean he had Sanji's shadow?



 I'm sure it does!



 There was the samurai who hit us with the back of his sword!



 May I see your panties?



 No way!



 That was Brook's shadow! And we had no idea!



 All of the strange things on this island are starting to make sense!



 He was just pretending to make zombies!



 That man is making a mockery of human life!



 How is this fulfilling "mankind's dream"?!



 How is this "resurrecting the dead"?!



 Dr. Hogback is a truly wonderful man! I respect him!



 He isn't the least bit interested in saving people!



 He's just a scumbag!



 Chopper...



 You don't have time to lament over that now!



 Our pals fell victim to his game of make-believe zombies!



 Don't you see? We're the only ones who can save them!



 Let's hurry! They carried Luffy's body down this way!



 Right! The perv said to take him to the ship.



 I wonder if he meant Sunny.



 If Zoro and Sanji met the same fate, we might find them there!



 I swear, those guys...



 ...can be such a handful!



 Usopp! Chopper!



 Are you okay?



 Wh-What?! Ow!



 Hey, let go of me!



 This freak... is really strong!



 Care to say your last farewells?



 This woman is going to marry me today!



 Moron! If I can't protect a single woman...



 ...there was no point in being born a man!



 Wow! Usopp, that w*apon--!



 Wh-Why does Usopp have it...?



 Eat this!



 Six Chamber Viper Star!



 He's vanishing again!



 Huh? I'm disappearing too?



 Why?!



 Nami vanished with him!



 Nami!



 Where are you?



 What's that?



 Some strong odor is masking his scent!



 Save me, Usopp! Cho--



 Hey, Nami! What happened?



 Where are you?



 Answer me, Nami!



 Zombies, I'll let you take over from here!



 Catch those two and bring them before Moria-sama!



 sh**t! Which direction is his voice coming from?



 Nami, where are you?



 Usopp, behind you!



 What's that?! A zombie in armor?!



 A bunch of zombies are downstairs, too!



 Wh-What now?



 Hey, this looks bad!



 We've got a bunch of zombies upstairs!



 Hey, pirates! Hand over your shadows!



 Ch-Chopper, don't get caught! They'll take our shadows.



 R-Right!



 Shadows...!



 Your shadows...!



 Hand over your shadows!



 There is even a zombie painting!



 No!



 Damn it! You guys play dirty!



 You're immortal and get to attack in numbers! It's no fair!



 That's low! Aw, man!



 All we want is your shadow, bro.



 Crap! Let go! sh**t!



 We can't let them catch us!



 Wait!



 There's more?!



 Fork over your shadows!



 Ow, ow, ow, ow...



 Give us your shadows!



 Grah! W-We... We're doomed...!



 Save me!



 Hey, someone else is here!



 Our buddies are getting purified!



 You'd better get your mitts...



 ...off my sworn little brothers, punks!



 C-Certainly!



 Who the heck are those guys? They're rottin' bad!



 Big Bro!



 Robin!



 Did we take too long? We're short one.



 Usopp, Chopper, are you two all right?



 If you're my shadow,



 why don't you understand how important this afro is?



 There is a reason why I can't afford to lose!



 Not my afro! Anything but the 'fro!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "A Belief Worth Begging to Live For!! Brook Defends His Afro!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 10x352 - A Belief Worth Begging to Live for!! Brook Defends His Afro

 Why?!



 Nami vanished with him!



 Nami!



 "A Belief Worth Begging to Live For!! Brook Defends His Afro!"



 ♪ Yo ho ho ho, yo ho ho ho ♪



 ♪ Yo ho ho ho, yo ho ho ho ♪



 ♪ Yo ho ho ho... ♪



 You refuse to quit even after I flung you outside?



 Of course! I will continue to come back until you return to me!



 Do you not know my name?



 All cower at the mere mention of the swordsman Ryuma!



 Silence! You are my shadow!



 Our bodies are worlds apart!



 You will come back to me! You belong under my feet!



 What a disaster!



 The Humming Swordsman isn't the only one here who knows our secret!



 This is rottin' bad!



 "I can't die" is like our secret code.



 I don't wanna live in fear of death!



 I heard that after a person loses his shadow,



 he gets taken down this long staircase.



 Right! Luffy got carried this way.



 We were chasing after him when Nami...



 Do you think Nami is okay?



 It's not like he wants to k*ll her.



 We'll save her when we come back!



 That's all the more reason to hurry to Sunny!



 We'll wake up Straw Hat and the guys and recover their shadows!



 But the island is infested with zombies. That won't be easy!



 Speaking of zombies, how did you take them out?



 That skeleton taught us how. We used this!



 Here, guys, take this.



 --What is it? --The zombies' weakness!



 You saw how effective it was in my battle against this spider monkey!



 This is their weakness? What exactly is it?



 It's salt.



 Zombies have a weakness?



 So we can purify them if we stuff salt into their mouths, huh?



 You saw what happened!



 By the way, what exactly was that monstrous roar that came from upstairs?



 Seriously! We followed that sound here.



 That was Luffy's voice.



 Say what?!



 I'll tell you all about what we saw.



 Long story short, we're in big trouble!



 Keep it coming! He still wants more!



 How much does a Special Zombie eat?



 He's going to consume everything on the island!



 He really stuffs his face...



 Kumacy, why were you harboring the pirates? Well?!



 B-But I--



 Don't talk! You're so not cute!



 Sorry, Mini-Shallot!



 You've been feeding me and I don't even know who you are.



 'Course, the quantity bites and the food's nasty.



 Watch it, Special Zombie! Don't step out of bounds!



 Who do you think gifted us with the ability to move?!



 I wouldn't be so rude to the ruler of Thriller Bark if I were you!



 Someday the master is going to become the King of the--



 Eh?



 I'm terribly sorry! He told me to say all of that.



 Dude! Don't sell a friend out!



 I'm hungry! I want more!



 Bring him more food.



 But he's gobbled up nearly all of the food on the island.



 What?



 We're storing food in the treasure room in the basement.



 Feel free to serve that.



 That's my Cindry-chan! Always prepared for anything!



 --Great! --I'm impressed that you set aside emergency rations.



 Huh? But if you give that to Oars,



 it defeats the point of the emergency rations!



 I hope we completely run out of food.



 That's not nice, Cindry-chan!



 Gyoro, Nin, Bao! Run over to Hogback's mansion and get the food!



 We're on it, Master!



 We'll lend a helping hand!



 Don't let those pirates find you!



 Same goes for the Humming Swordsman.



 If these guys could remove the spider monkey's shadow,



 they're super bad news!



 Gaaah!



 Is it the pirates?! The Humming Swordsman?!



 I thought I dropped this, but here it is! It's the basement key.



 Don't scare us!



 This leads to the basement!



 Haul the stuff back up--all of it!



 Yeah! Hurry! Hurry!



 Master!



 Feed him already!



 Yes, sir!



 This batch is actually pretty good.



 A salted fish is somewhere in that pile.



 I hope he eats it.



 What?!



 I-It's salted?!



 If the Special Zombie eats that, its shadow will--



 If that happens, the master is going to let us have it!



 We have to find it before he does!



 Fish... Where is the fish?



 P-P-Perona-sama...



 Shut it! Don't say anything, Kumacy!



 Fish! Fish! Fish! Fish!



 What are you doing?



 Help me!



 Oh, it's a fish.



 Is this salt?



 Stupid!



 This is it! I just know it!



 Hide the thing!



 That fish looks mighty yummy.



 I-I don't think you'll find it to your liking, Special Zombie-sama!



 R-Right!



 That's the sort of thing I have to find out for myself.



 What are you doing? Do you want to get eaten along with the fish?



 Shut up!



 No matter what, don't let him eat this!



 Hey! Why are you guys getting between me and my fish?!



 Ummm...



 W-W-We thought this might taste better.



 Right, right!



 Yeah?



 Dried meat! Yeah, it's really good!



 I'm starving after all that hard work.



 I think I'll help myself to some fish.



 Shhh! Hush!



 Listen, Oars! Five hundred years ago, you left behind countless legends



 as an infamous villain!



 And just now, I resurrected you in modern times to serve as my subordinate.



 "Subordinate"? Forget it! I have a dream.



 I've never heard of a zombie like this before!



 This room is cramped and boring.



 I'm gonna head on outside.



 Maybe I'll set sail and travel once around the world.



 A voyage around the world?!



 Moron! That's impossible!



 This special freezer is encased in a super thick wall made of steel!



 You couldn't put a dent in--



 Gum-Gum... p*stol!



 He's amazing!



 That's awesome!



 W-W-Wait, dude!



 This is rottin' bad! Oars has gone outside!



 That's strange. I could have sworn my arm could stretch.



 Oh, well.



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!



 You are going to disgrace yourself by crying,



 "Anything but my afro! Anything but my afro!"



 as you beg me to spare your life, just like last time.



 No, that's not how it will go down!



 I'm getting nowhere!



 I mustered the courage to strike down those scary-looking zombies,



 but they got right back up!



 They must have some sort of weakness!



 At this rate, I won't get my shadow back



 even if I find my zombie!



 And to top it off, zombies have horrendously scary faces!



 One of the guys got purified.



 What happened?!



 This picky eater just had to grill the fish with salt!



 --Huh? --The idiot! He must have been new.



 He grilled the fish with salt...?



 Could this be the zombies' weakness?!



 B-Bastard! We stole your shadow the other day, Skeleton!



 How did you get back?



 Answer my question!



 Which zombie did you stuff my shadow into?!



 If you don't answer, I'll scatter fish all across the island!



 "Fish"?



 So what if you scatter them around?



 Huh? Uh, that's strange...



 But it couldn't possibly be salt...



 Eh? "Salt"?



 S-S-So what if you s-s-scatter that around?



 It's salt!



 Zombies really are insanely scary! I hate nighttime!



 J-Jeez... It was just a grasshopper.



 It gave me a fright.



 But it's dangerous for me to be out during daylight hours.



 Plus it's easy for enemies to find me then.



 I've got it! I'll sing!



 When I'm scared, singing can serve as a good distraction.



 I'll be careful not to look at the zombies' faces as I swiftly purify them.



 I'm bound to run into my shadow eventually!



 Where is that song coming from?



 Who's humming?



 Who're you?!



 No!



 What's the deal? What is happening on this island?!



 He appears out of the darkness while humming.



 This scary-looking swordsman is searching for his shadow!



 He's wiped out practically all of the Soldier Zombies!



 Please do something!



 Perona-sama, we have a problem.



 Shut it! Don't wake me up, Kumacy!



 Get up!



 At last we meet!



 Why is he so strong? Isn't this zombie supposed to be me?



 I can't keep up! And here we use the same style!



 Surrender!



 It will end the same no matter how many times you come after me.



 If you would like to increase your speed somewhat,



 I shall cut that troublesome afro.



 D-Don't! At the very least, please leave my afro alone!



 Anything but my hair!



 Why don't you understand?!



 If you're my shadow, why don't you understand how important this afro is?



 Time has stopped for my body,



 so it would never grow back!



 What of it? I have forgotten all about the days I served you.



 My current masters are Moria-sama and Absalom-sama!



 A skeleton that treasures its afro is nothing short of ridiculous!



 P-Please stop! Anything but my afro! Anything but my afro!



 Anything but my afro! Not my afro! Not the 'fro!



 That was a dirty move! Are you not ashamed of yourself?!



 Say what you will! There is a reason why I cannot afford to lose!



 You are most pathetic, former master.



 I am sorry. I admit defeat...



 Please let me go...



 I will leave this island...



 Then leave at once!



 If you were to die, it would affect me as well.



 That was the epitome of disgrace.



 Say what you will!



 While waiting for my chance to return,



 I have spent these past five years...



 ...growing stronger!



 Absalom-sama!



 You better be ready to hold the wedding.



 Yes, yes. We can start whenever you like.



 My, what a lovely bride!



 We're going to start right away!



 Get her dressed and bring her to the ceremony hall.



 All right! I'm on it.



 That right? So that skeleton helped you out, huh?



 And that's not all!



 That punk said he's endured these past fifty years to keep a promise with a friend.



 A whale friend...



 A-A whale...?



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "A Man's Promise Never Dies!! To the Friend Waiting Under the Distant Sky!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 No, that's not how it will go down!



 While waiting for my chance to return,



 I have spent these past five years...



 ...growing stronger!



 "A Man's Promise Never Dies!! To the Friend Waiting Under the Distant Sky!"



 "Evil..."



 A monster that could tower over giants?



 Yeah! He's the one who made all that noise and screamed.



 I bet Luffy's zombie is hooting and hollering as he runs rampant.



 Let's hurry!



 Hey, look! There's Sunny!



 Yeah! That skeleton knew what he was talkin' about!



 Indeed!



 Whoosh!



 I get it! Those stairs led to the entrance.



 I couldn't tell through all that fog when we barged in,



 but the stairway up was a shortcut to the last boss's room...



 Folding stairs...? Is this how we're supposed to get down?



 Whoa! Man, we've been wiped clean!



 The zombies must have done it.



 There are muddy footprints everywhere.



 What?! They could still be around.



 What a mess!



 Yeah, they looted us, all right. Not that we have anything worth taking.



 Are there any zombies...?



 How about the guys in question?



 I don't see them.



 Hey, Luffy! Zoro! Sanji!



 Where are you?! Say something!



 They must be inside.



 What makes you so sure?



 We heard that their zombies will also die



 if Luffy and the guys are exposed to sunlight.



 Gotcha. Chopper and Franky, you two search the first floor.



 Robin and I will search the second floor.



 Zombies could still be hiding somewhere on board, so be careful!



 Right!



 Found them! Hey, I found them!



 They're in the dining room! All three of them are up here!



 Luffy!



 How... could they do such a thing...?



 The zombies had a blast "decorating" them...



 They were merciless.



 Wake up, Luffy! Man, you can't sleep looking like this!



 Luffy!



 C'mon!



 Leave this to me.



 Hey, wake up! This isn't the time to catch some Z's!



 We've got a serious problem here!



 They're still asleep...



 Do they even have a nervous system?



 They're askin' for it.



 Guys, outta the way. I'm using my bazooka.



 Nah, it's cool.



 At times like this...



 There's a hot master swordswoman with meat!



 --"Hot"? --"Meat"?



 --"Master swordswoman"?! --These guys are hopeless!



 Did you hear that?



 Yeah! Didn't he say   -  -  ?



 These are truly...



 ...miraculous measurements!



 This is the one.



 Yes, yes. You'll look lovely in this.



 Now let's get you changed right quick.



 Oh, yeah!



 Ow!



 What are you doing, geezer?!



 Now, now! I'm doing it for your own good.



 If you leered at the naked flesh of the woman about to wed Absalom-sama,



 he would make you pay dearly!



 Isn't that right, Absalom-sama?



 D-Don't tell me...



 He was... still...



 ...in here?!



 We're in rottin' trouble!



 Damn it! He noticed I was still there.



 Hey! Have the General Zombies congregate in the ceremony hall! Hop to it!



 C-Certainly!



 Y-You jerk!



 --Give my shadow-- --Calm down! Moria isn't here.



 Huh? Where am I?



 On Sunny.



 Sunny?! What are we doing back here?



 Wait... None of that was a dream...!



 My shadow is missing! This feels so weird.



 Hey, this is bad! We have a disaster on hand! We're all out of food!



 Crap!



 We had our galley packed nicely, but now it's empty.



 They took off with everything but some emergency rations.



 I can't live off cheese and dried bread! Gimme meat!



 But...



 This is really humiliating. I wasn't taking things seriously enough!



 I lost my pirate lunch...



 Cheese doesn't cut it! Cheese bites!



 By the way, I don't see Nami-san.



 Oh, about that...



 Yeah...



 You let her get abducted?!



 Why didn't you follow her to the ends of the earth?!



 Sorry! But it's not like I could just run after them!



 Who the heck is the jerk?! I'll get her back before you can bat an eye!



 Whoa, wait! Please hear me out first!



 Okay, I'll make this quick.



 Generally speaking, there are two things we need to get back!



 Our food, Nami, and our shadows, right? That's three things!



 Wow, I wasn't expecting you to rank things in that order.



 First off, let me fill you in about Nami and your shadows.



 Wha--? M-M-Marriage?!



 Don't be stupid! I won't let that happen!



 He's got guts to marry Nami...



 And there is a giant version of me?



 That's how you make a zombie?



 So you've already found Luffy's and the cook's zombies, Usopp?



 I-I had no idea he was one of the Seven Warlords...



 Fear suddenly set in...



 You guys didn't know?



 How were we supposed to know?!



 Oh, man! I don't have time for this.



 That's right! If the zombies act just like us,



 then I saw your zombie, Zoro.



 What was he like?



 No different from you.



 Scars on the back are a swordsman's shame!



 But I am covered in scars.



 I knew he wasn't you, since he was wearing sandals.



 Okay, whatever.



 So we need to find a zombie in sandals, Luffy's giant, and the cook's dogguin.



 Our shadows will come back if we throw salt in their mouths, right?



 Yeah, that's how it works.



 But honestly, I'm amazed you discovered that weakness.



 All of our info came from that bag of bones,



 from how to defeat the zombies to how to rescue you guys.



 Really?! You saw Brook?



 Yeah, I did. And I asked him a stupid question when I saw him.



 See, I totally rejected his very existence when you first brought him



 aboard our ship to join our crew...



 He might be a flimsy skeleton,



 but when I talked to him, he had an iron backbone!



 One fitting for a skeleton...



 He...



 He...



 He's a real man!



 I had to ask him...



 Well, you'll have to pardon me.



 I'm in a hurry. Take care!



 Stop right there!



 On top of everything you've told us, answer this one question before you go.



 You know how people will react



 if you appear before them as you are now, don't you?



 You're a talking skeleton! You'll never make friends.



 The abnormal are ostracized.



 Franky, what are you...?



 Even if you leave the Devil's Sea, your fate is sealed...



 And to make matters worse, you've spent the past several decades trapped here!



 Didn't you say, "I got so lonely that I wanted to die"?



 If I were you, I would have taken my own life ages ago.



 Your existence bites...



 Sometimes you act like a gentleman to hide the core of the conversation.



 You're doing all of this because you want to keep a promise...



 What exactly did you promise your crewmates?



 You're rather nosy, aren't you?



 It's quite simple.



 Long ago, we left a member of my crew behind at a certain location.



 It was unavoidable, yet sad.



 When we set sail, we vehemently swore that we would return.



 But then we were annihilated on these seas,



 preventing us from keeping our promise.



 As the sole survivor from our ship, it is my duty to tell him what has happened!



 I believe it has been... fifty years now since the day we died.



 Fifty years?! Hey, that was ages ago!



 I wasn't even born yet!



 Sorry, but I doubt he's been waiting that long!



 What right...?!



 What right do I have to decide whether or not he's still waiting?



 If he's still waiting for us, believing that we'll keep our promise...



 Can you imagine how lonesome he must feel?



 If he's still waiting while under the belief that we've betrayed him,



 can you imagine how miserable he must be?



 Man...



 We swore to reunite with my crewmate off some capes. His name is...



 ...Laboon!



 He was a young whale,



 so we couldn't possibly bring him with us on our dangerous voyage.



 A whale...?



 Yeah...



 Goodbye!



 Later! Take care!



 I imagine he's grown rather big by now.



 Your crewmate... is a whale?



 That's right. I can't help but think he still believes in us.



 Perhaps he thinks we'll play our typical lively music



 and come back waving.



 I doubt he will forgive us for irresponsibly dying on him...



 We made a selfish promise



 and died under a distant sky where our voices couldn't reach him.



 "I'm sorry we died" could never cut it!



 We gave our word as men that we would return!



 And that's why he's still alive...



 Laboon...



 Seriously?



 It's him...



 Yeah.



 Oh, yeah. Chopper wasn't there for this, huh?



 You...! What the hell did you do to my special seat?!



 I'm strong, aren't I?



 Our fight isn't over yet! So we have to fight again.



 Your buddies're dead, but I'm your rival forever.



 We definitely have to fight again in order to decide who is stronger.



 After going around the Grand Line, we'll come back to see you again.



 When I come back, let's fight again!



 Hmmm. This is good.



 This is the symbol of our promise to fight again.



 Until we come back, don't remove that mark by hitting your head.



 We know him.



 We know that whale.



 That cape on the Grand Line...?



 Whoa, wait! He's still waiting after fifty years?!



 What a touching story!



 I didn't expect that skeleton to have a past like that...



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "I Swear to Go See Him!! Brook and the Cape of Promise!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 10x354 - I Swear to Go See Him! Brook and the Cape of Promise
comment:
Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 We've left the established course



 Right now, we're rowing straight toward



 The borderline between the sky and the ocean



 In the dark depths of the ocean, adventure holds its breath



 Don't you have a good time just imagining it?



 Travel across the oceans of the world



 Bellow a battle cry



 Once your heart feels refreshed, let the signal to set sail ring out



 "That feeling" I get when embarking



 Is something I hope to remember always



 If I can, I won't be afraid of anything



 With our pulses racing, let's go on a trip now



 Shy hearts engrave the rhythm of adventure



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Life is "Adventurous"



 Be aware it's "Dangerous"



 Who's gonna be "One of us"



 And a trip goes on because



 We da pirate of the "Mass"



 To the West, To the East



 Gotta find my way, Sail away



 All the way to "One piece"!!



 Stuff a dream into your empty chest



 And spread your wings



 If the wind blowing through them dyes your heart



 Let's press forward



 Snatch up the treasure here and there



 While laughing out loud



 As we dash by like a noisy party



 Make some waves...



 Wealth, fame, power...



 Gold Roger, the King of the Pirates,



 once attained everything this world has to offer.



 The words he uttered just before his death



 drove people around the world to the seas.



 My treasure? If you want it, you can have it!



 Find it! I left everything this world has to offer there!



 And so men rushed onto the Grand Line in pursuit of romanticism!



 The world has truly entered a Great Pirate Era!



 They were merciless.



 Wha--? M-M-Marriage?!



 Don't be stupid! I won't let that happen!



 He's got guts to marry Nami...



 And there is a giant version of me?



 That's how you make a zombie?



 So we need to find a zombie in sandals, Luffy's giant, and the cook's dogguin.



 Our shadows will come back if we throw salt in their mouths, right?



 But honestly, I'm amazed you discovered that weakness.



 All of our info came from that bag of bones,



 from how to defeat the zombies to how to rescue you guys.



 He...



 He's a real man!



 Didn't you say, "I got so lonely that I wanted to die"?



 If I were you, I would have taken my own life ages ago.



 You're doing all of this because you want to keep a promise...



 What exactly did you promise your crewmates?



 It's quite simple.



 Long ago, we left a member of my crew behind at a certain location.



 It was unavoidable, yet sad.



 When we set sail, we vehemently swore that we would return.



 But then we were annihilated on these seas,



 preventing us from keeping our promise.



 I believe it has been... fifty years now since the day we died.



 Fifty years?! Hey, that was ages ago!



 I wasn't even born yet!



 Sorry, but I doubt he's been waiting that long!



 What right do I have to decide whether or not he's still waiting?



 We swore to reunite with my crewmate off some capes. His name is...



 ...Laboon!



 I doubt he will forgive us for irresponsibly dying on him...



 We made a selfish promise



 and died under a distant sky where our voices couldn't reach him.



 "I'm sorry we died" could never cut it!



 We gave our word as men that we would return!



 And that's why he's still alive...



 Laboon...



 Seriously?



 It's him...



 Yeah.



 Oh, yeah. Chopper wasn't there for this, huh?



 We know him.



 We know that whale.



 "I Swear to Go See Him!! Brook and the Cape of Promise!"



 You know him?!



 Why? How'd you meet?



 Twin Capes is at the entrance to the Grand Line.



 A freakishly huge whale was there...



 Nami-san! I see a mountain up ahead!



 A mountain?! That can't be!



 But it's really there!



 Who cares?! Go!!



 Hm?



 Oh, crap!!



 It's not a mountain!!



 It's a black wall!!



 No, it's not!!



 Then what is it?!



 I-I-It's a whale!!



 Wh-Wh-What're we gonna do?!



 --Shall we fight? --Idiot! There's no way we can fight that!



 B-B-But our path is blocked! What're we gonna do?!



 Oh, yeah! I've got an idea!



 Luffy...? Hey, what're you doing?!



 It doesn't work! The ship doesn't turn!



 --Dammit! --Don't give up!



 Is this it...?!



 Cannon?!



 All right! Did it stop?



 Ah... We're screwed...



 This might be it...



 My special seat...!



 Let's get out of here before it's too late!!



 What the heck is going on?!



 Did he not notice the cannon attack because his body's too big?!



 Or is he just slow?!



 Who knows?! Anyway, let's get out of here now!



 Ahhh! My ears hurt!



 Paddle! Just paddle!!



 We have to get away from him!



 Luffy...?



 You...! What the hell did you do to my special seat?!



 Dumbass!!



 Wh-What?



 --Luffy! --Luffy!



 I'm not gonna die!!



 Thanks to Luffy's silliness, we got swallowed whole.



 Th... The whale ate you?!



 And that was Laboon, right?



 Right. There was an ancient lighthouse keeper who lived inside the whale.



 What?!



 Flower pops!



 He had been treating Laboon from the inside.



 The lighthouse keeper was treating him?



 Supposedly he used to be the medic on a pirate ship.



 Yeah? But why did he need treatment? Was he sick?



 He was continually bashing his head



 against the Red Line, which is like a wall dividing our world.



 He's been waiting fifty years for some pirates who promised to come for him



 after they traveled around the world.



 But fifty years...? Those pirates sure are making him wait a long time...



 Idiot! This is the Grand Line.



 They're dead.



 No matter how long he waits, they won't come back.



 Yeah, it's true that fifty years ago the Grand Line was an uncharted sea



 more terrible and chaotic than it is now.



 Why are you talking so hopeless?! You don't know that for sure yet!



 They might come back! It's a very touching story!



 A whale continues to believe in the promise with his friends... Right, pops?!



 Yeah... But reality is cruel.



 I confirmed it using reliable information. They ran away... from the Grand Line.



 Can't be... Don't tell me... they left without him?!



 Even if they are alive, they'll probably never come back here.



 Seasons. Weather. Current. Wind direction.



 They are all random. Common sense is useless in the Grand Line.



 The terror of the Grand Line takes over weak minds in an instant.



 They abandoned this whale?! When he's been waiting for fifty years...?!



 That's cruel!



 If you know that, why haven't you told him?



 That whale can understand what people say, right?



 I did tell him... everything.



 Listen to me, Laboon! They're not gonna...



 I understand you don't wanna accept it.



 But you somehow have to accept it...



 Laboon!



 Laboon!



 It's since then that he started howling at Reverse Mountain



 and that he started slamming his body against the Red Line...



 It's as if he's insisting that they'll come back from the other side of that wall any time now...



 What a whale...



 When there's no point in waiting...



 He refuses my words because if he accepts them, it means that there is no point in waiting.



 He's afraid of that more than anything.



 He's from the West Blue. There's no way of going back there now.



 That's why those pirates he came here with are his only buddies and hope.



 Look at the scars on his forehead!



 If he continues to hit his head hard like that, he'll die without doubt.



 It's a strange relationship, but I've been with him for    long years.



 I can't just stand by and watch him die now.



 Hmph!



 --Huh? --What's that idiot doing?



 When we looked away for a second...



 Is he pretending he's mountain climbing or something?



 Gum-Gum...



 ...Flower Arrangement!



 Isn't that a mast?



 Yep. It's from our ship.



 It's the main mast... Hey! Don't break the ship!



 What the hell are you doing?!



 Wha...?! Hey, kid!



 Don't worry. He doesn't die even when he's crushed!



 Ha! Dummy!



 What does he think he's doing?!



 Luffy! What the hell are you trying to do?!



 It's a draw!



 I'm strong, aren't I?



 You wanna defeat me, don't you?!



 Our fight isn't over yet! So we have to fight again.



 Your buddies're dead, but I'm your rival forever.



 We definitely have to fight again in order to decide who is stronger.



 After going around the Grand Line, we'll come back to see you again.



 When I come back, let's fight again!



 Hmmm. This is good.



 This is the symbol of our promise to fight again.



 Until we come back, don't remove that mark by hitting your head. Got that?!



 All right!



 See ya, flower pops! Thanks for the log pose!



 Yeah. Have a safe trip!



 See ya, whale! I'm leaving now!



 To Whisky Peak...



 ...full speed ahead!!



 Yeah!!



 Luffy got him to stop k*lling himself by hitting his head on the wall,



 so he's still alive...



 Even now, he's waiting for his crewmates back at those capes.



 It's an unbelievable story.



 Both sides have been keeping their promise for fifty years!



 I had no idea one of the people Laboon has been waiting for...



 ...was that skeleton!



 I, too, have grown stronger during these past five years!



 We share the same thought patterns!



 I see you still hold your afro dear.



 You cannot possibly hope to defend such a large weakness.



 Silence!



 Laboon, do you still remember us?



 My heart grows tight whenever I think about you.



 Although I don't have a heart anymore!



 We were not strong enough to face the harsh cruelty of the Grand Line!



 All of our friends have died!



 As for me, I lost everything along with my crewmates, including my face and body...



 Even if we were to meet again, you probably wouldn't recognize me



 now that I've been reduced to a skeleton!



 Don't! Don't!



 Don't hurt my afro!



 I have nothing left...



 But I want to protect this hair, which everyone said resembled you!



 Seeing them like this, they look just alike!



 Brook's hair really resembles Laboon!



 Hey, Brother!



 I will protect the last remnant of who I was!



 I swear I will go see you!



 So I'd like you to keep waiting...



 ...at the capes...



 ...where we made our promise.



 I love that bag of bones and that whale, dammit!



 Shuddup!



 Now I'm getting excited!



 He's a musician, a talking skeleton, has an afro, goes "Yo-ho ho!"



 and was Laboon's pal!



 He's coming aboard our ship, even if I have to drag him.



 He's joining our crew! Any objections, guys?



 If there were, would you change your mind?



 I wanna help him see Laboon again!



 You've got my vote, dammit!



 Same here, dummy! I'm not afraid of that skeleton!



 That's a given. I'm more concerned about stopping Nami-san's marriage!



 Hey, Zoro! Where are you going?



 I'm going to raid the place. Don't we have one more shadow to recover now?



 Sweet! Guys, get ready for our counterattack!



 We're gonna knock Thriller Bark outta the water!



 Yeah!



 --Go! --You're coming, stupid!



 Unforgiveable! Who's trying to marry Nami-san?!



 Oh, I forgot to mention this,



 but when Nami was in the bath, that invisible man--



 What did you just say?! Wh-Wh-What did he do when she was in the bath?!



 He looked her up and down.



 The bastard!



 On the next episode of One Piece!



 "Food, Nami, and Shadows!! Luffy's Enraged Counterattack!"



 I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

 What's this pole?



 I might as well see what's at the top.



 Here I go!



 That's strange. I coulda sworn my arms could stretch...



 Weird! Did I dream that up?



 I wonder if my legs can stretch.



 Wh-What's that?!



 Is that an earthquake?!



 Sheesh! He's a stinking zombie, so why does Oars have such a free spirit?!



 What the heck is he doing up there? He's making a ruckus.



 Looks like they don't stretch.



 Well, darn. I'll just have to climb.



 Man! Hunting down the zombies with our shadows



 sounds like it's gonna be a pain.



 And Luffy's zombie is a real monster!



 He's over twice the size of your average giant!



 I'm not sure you guys can beat him!



 Size isn't the only issue! Luffy, he has your shadow!



 Don't be such a baby!



 Z-Zoro?



 Size and strength mean nothing.



 The only way to get Luffy's shadow back is to take him down, right?



 We don't need to search for the zombies.



 Although I would like to see mine!



 What's gotten into you?



 If we stay like this, we'll never get to walk under the light of the sun again!



 But remember what that grandpa zombie told us?



 I saw what you just did! You're terribly strong, aren't you?



 So what did you wanna discuss?



 There is a man I would like you to defeat.



 I'm sure you could take him down!



 He has created countless victims,



 all of whom could be saved if you defeated him!



 If we take out Gecko Moria, everyone will get their shadow back!



 Y-Yeah, that's what he said...



 He's cutting to the heart of the problem again...



 And isn't Moria at the top of that staircase?



 Whoa! He's dead on again!



 So anyway, I'm gonna kick Moria's butt.



 That way everyone will get their shadow back.



 Sanji, you're in charge of rescuing Nami!



 Yeah!



 You'd better believe I am!



 I don’t care if he’s an invisible man or a dismissible sham!



 I'll kick him to the ends of this fog!



 I'll crash that wedding!



 Oh, I forgot to mention this earlier,



 but that invisible man ogled at Nami in the bath.



 Uh-huh, uh-huh.



 What?!



 Curse him!



 Don't fire him up any more.



 I'm afraid he might transform into something.



 Damn you, invisible man! You're gonna pay!



 Awesome! He exploded!



 I feel bad about letting Nami get whisked away right before my eyes.



 I'm going with Sanji!



 Besides, I don't wanna run into that w*rlord again!



 That skeleton's duel has me concerned.



 I'm going after him.



 If Straw Hat throttles Moria before he gets to fight,



 that will be the end of it.



 But we'll have a problem on our hands if his shadow trashes him first.



 I'll join you, Franky.



 What's the zombie of a legendary samurai capable of? I'm dying to find out.



 Nami-chan and the skeleton...



 Simply put, they're the ones who need immediate help.



 Finally, subduing Moria is key to claiming victory.



 Guys, you're making this sound simple,



 but he's one of the Seven Warlords!



 Not a problem! So was Crocodile, remember?



 And you don't see the problem?! He nearly k*lled you!



 I'm begging you! Please be careful!



 I've already spelled this out loud and clear, but your zombie is insane!



 I get it, I get it!



 I'm on my way, Nami-san!



 These are for you. Guys, you each get a bag.



 They contain my special Zombie Ascension Salt Balls.



 Oh, is this what you were making back there? I should have known.



 You guys have no sense of danger, so let me make this perfectly clear!



 Just because these waters are shrouded in thick fog



 doesn't guarantee safety from the sunlight!



 You're only safe because it's night!



 In other words, consider your drop-dead time limit to be dawn, when the sun rises!



 No matter what, you can't forget about this time limit!



 You're absolutely right! It'd suck if I couldn't eat before dawn.



 We're gonna make you rue the day you picked a fight with us!



 Gecko Moria, we're taking back twice the amount of food you stole!



 And before dawn!



 Yeah!



 Uh, no. That's not what I meant.



 You have to recover your shadows by--



 --Let's go! --Yeah!



 --Uh, no. I meant-- --Nami-san! Take my hand, honey!



 Fine, ignore me!



 This spells trouble! I need to hurry and inform the master.



 Awesome! This is a ship?



 Neat! Too cool!



 I can't see squat on these waters,



 but I see a great future ahead of me!



 That was a close one.



 All righty! With this ship, I'm gonna become King of the Pirates!



 Where is Oars right now?



 He has climbed to the top of the mast, Master.



 Is that right?



 Hey! Really now, Master!



 We can't enjoy our Laidback Fever



 with that massive, dream-filled zombie wandering around the island!



 That bastard is rottin' bad news!



 Leave him be! It's just a matter of time.



 He'll calm down before long.



 With Oars on our side,



 we'll be able to steal shadows from stronger pirates!



 We'll start creating Special Zombies left and right!



 I'm going to need stronger mario, Hogback!



 Just leave that to me.



 H-Hogback-sama!

You made a big mistake

when you challenged me to a contest in lying and negativity!

Sleep till dawn!

Wha ha ha! Hee hee hee! Click my heels!

Didn't that samurai just say something?

Long story short, what just happened?

In short, the fight is apparently over.

I've never seen a duel like this before.

That samurai wasn't taking me the least bit seriously!

You mean to steal my katana? You are a feisty one.

Let’s see what this "Two-Sword Style," or whatever it is, can do.

I am tingling with excitement!

I'm so excited I could dance!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Slashes Dancing on the Rooftop!! Showdown: Zoro vs. Ryuma!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 10x362 - Slashes Dancing On the Rooftop!! Zoro vs. Ryuma's Showdown
comment:
Ow, ow, ow...

What's the hold-up?

Weren't you going to kick my butt as many times as it takes?

Yeah! I will in just a sec, so hang tight!

Well, I don't mind the wait, but he'll come back if you don't hurry.

"He"? Who are you talking about?

You!

That's right. I don't have time to be goofing off.

I need to hurry back.

Oh, jeez. You're such a handful.

Don't! Robin is a lady!

A lady...?

What of it?!

Robin!

Unbelievable! Sanji actually kicked...

Golden...

No!

...Pound!

Sleep till dawn!

Didn't that samurai just say something?

Long story short, what just happened?

In short, the fight is apparently over.

I've never seen a duel like this before.

That samurai wasn't taking me the least bit seriously!

"Slashes Dancing on the Rooftop!! Showdown: Zoro vs. Ryuma!"



You think that you can steal my black sword, Shusui?

To be precise, I'm going to take the sword from beside your corpse.

I see. You are full of spirit!

I wouldn't provoke him if I were you...

I see you also carry three swords.

Yeah, but one is a broken blade.

I just carry it at my waist because it doesn't feel right without it.

I'm a Three-Sword Style swordsman.

A Three-Sword Style swordsman? I've never heard of such a thing.

Is it a circus act?

It's a pity I can't let you see it in action right now.

I'd break that squat nose of yours!

I'm sure. You seem quite strong.

Emotions beyond my recollection are surfacing.

I feel as though I am standing face to face with a giant beast.

It is a strange, exhilarating sensation!

I feel as though I could start dancing.

What a shock!

Aubade Coup Droit!

H-He used a p*stol?!

I-It was a thrust!

If I used that move, it wouldn't be as impressive!

He shot a hole through the wall!

To sh**t a thrust like that... Just how strong is he?!

I'd say it's a draw.

Yep.

You nearly got me.

What the heck?!

When did that Haramaki freak get in a counter attack?!

The att*cks... were nearly simultaneous.

So he can throw his att*cks as well.

The skirmish between them just now truly did end in a draw.

The samurai zombie is currently using my shadow to move,



but the samurai was probably an expert swordsman when he was still alive.

I believe those two may possess the same type of build as swordsmen.

Does it mean anything if they share the same build?

It means their strengths lie in the same areas.

I doubt this duel will last long.

Prelude Au Fer!

A sword-breaker as*ault?!

Two-Sword Style... Flash!

Demon Magma Bear!

Gavotte Bond en Avant!

Two-Sword Style Sword Draw...

...Rashomon!

He blocked my attack!

They slashed through the support beams!

Oh, crud! This floor is toast! It's dangerous up here!

Man, hang on! We're gettin' outta here.

The whole roof's comin' down!

Seventy-two Pound Phoenix!

Polka Remise!

Weapons Left!

Dang, that was close!

Careful! You don't want to fall!

Falling...!

How can they fight with such poor footing...?

I'm afraid my swords will break if this drags out much longer.

He truly has the body and spirit needed to support the

strength of a legendary swordsman.

One-Sword Style!

Soaring Dragon...

Three-Pace Hum...

...Notch Slash!

...Blaze!

My wound is bursting into flames!

I have lost.

Once, a legendary samurai wielded the great sword Shusui.

I am sure this katana would be happy to have you as its master.

Didn't that samurai just say something?

Long story short, what just happened?

In short, the fight is apparently over.

I've never seen a duel like this before.

That samurai wasn't taking me the least bit seriously!

Hey, Skeleton! What do you mean it's "over"?

It was an incredible duel...

It pains my samurai heart that I must taste defeat...

The fact that you feel ashamed proves...

...that you are a swordsman in both mind and body!

I wish we could have met when you were still alive.

I-Isn't that...?

It sure is! It's my shadow, which Moria snatched away

from me five years ago!

Look! It's copying whatever I do!

Isn't that a given? It's your shadow.

This might be hard for you to understand, but I'm finally my old self again!

I'm touched! I'm moved!

These emotions are coursing through my veins!

Ah, not that I have any veins.

I guess they go "bone deep."

It's back! After five years, I have a shadow again!

I'll take your sword, but I'll pretend that our duel never happened...

...samurai of the Wano Kingdom!

I wonder if Sanji has already found and rescued Nami.

And how are Luffy and the others doing?

At any rate, I've just gotta tell everyone about how I beat

that Horo-Horo Chick when they didn't stand a chance against her!

I can't wait to see their faces!

Perona-sama!

Do you think she's okay?

Of course! Captain Kumacy and Lieutenant Gentleman Hippopotamus went after her!

By now, Mr. Negative Nose is the one crying like a baby!

Phew, that was a close call!

All of my hard work would go down the drain if I got taken down now.

There'd go my bragging rights.

Moving on! Sanji! Guys!

What happened here...?

Weren't they supposed to be attending Absalom-sama's wedding?

The Special Zombie did this to them.

Absalom-sama ordered them to forcibly stop Oars,

but he took them out in the blink of an eye.

Absurd! Even though he's a Special Zombie, he's still a zombie!

Why would he attack his comrades?

Oars is rather new to his life as a zombie.

Apparently he still has Straw Hat's personality.

Awesome! This is a ship?

All righty! With this ship, I'm gonna become King of the Pirates!

Gum-Gum...

Actually, I'm not made of rubber.

Gatling!

Don't get in the way of my adventure!

I suspect it will take a while for him to become an obedient zombie...

Wh-What?! He took out all of these General Zombies in an instant?

That's right.

They must have let their guard down!

Otherwise this never would have happened.

If I were you, I'd start running!

Otherwise, Oars will do you in as well!

Silence, Hildon! Are you mocking us?!

The monster! How dare he k*ll our comrades?!

Since Absalom-sama gave those orders,

no one will mind if we teach him a thing or two!

I swear by our title as the strongest

that we will let Oars know just how powerful the General Zombies are!

--Ch-Charge! --Yeah!

Don't get in my way!

Gum-Gum...

Oh, oops! That's right. I'd forgotten!

I need to hurry on back.

What happened to all of that fire you had earlier, Straw Hat?

Damn it! Don't act so high-and-mighty

when you aren't fighting, Giant Shallot!

I've already told you:

I am the man who will let others make me the King of the Pirates.

And it looks like the day I realize my dream has gotten a whole lot closer!



I'll keep taking you down until I recover all of the shadows!

Like I said, defeating me won't--

When ya get down to it, I just need to defeat you and this shadow!

Gum-Gum Rocket!

I don't care what happens to you, but as things stand, your future looks bleak.

A more powerful foe will be here any minute now, you know?

Dr. Chopper, listen. The zombies are happy.

After all, they are given a second chance to live amongst us as humans!

--You're wrong! --I'm wrong? Like your medical knowhow--

Shut up! That isn't a medical procedure!

I'll never forgive you!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Chopper Is Furious!! Hogback's Evil Medical Practices!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

link: 10x363 - Chopper Is Furious!! Hogback's Evil Medical Practices
comment:
One-Sword Style!

Soaring Dragon...

Three-Pace Hum...

...Notch Slash!

...Blaze!

I have lost.

...samurai of the Wano Kingdom!

"Chopper Is Furious!! Hogback's Evil Medical Practices!"

Tell me: How does it feel to be subjugated by the might of your friends?

I can't believe you tried to stuff salt down my throat with your weird powers!

They're strong!

Darn it! I never expected Sanji to kick Robin.

He isn't Sanji anymore!

Who is that Sanji guy? Don't make me k*ll you, jerk face.

I'm afraid they don't have a single memory of your days as crewmates!



Occasionally fresh zombies retain some of the shadow's feelings,

but these shadows have fully settled into their bodies.

They've completely lost their human hearts.

They've become zombies that will obey my every command!

As far as zombies are concerned, their orders are absolute!



I'm actually happy... to see that you're rotten to the core, Hogback!

In all actuality, you have saved countless lives.

I really did respect you as a doctor.

The same goes for your zombie research.

Death can come suddenly...

I'm sure there are a lot of things the deceased

and those they left behind never got a chance to say.

I'm not asking for years. If they could have just a few minutes!

If there was a way to bring back the dead...

...even if people cast stones, calling it "evil medicine"...

...it would mean the world to those it saved!

So when you said that you were researching how to "resurrect the dead,"

I thought that you truly were an amazing doctor.

Fool! Why would I go to such lengths for others?

You said that you respected how I used to save lives, but it was the same deal!

I was simply a genius!

I conducted operations for money,

but there was no stopping the unwanted flood of patients

that came from around the world for treatment!

"Save my dad!"

"Save my child!"

"Save my beloved!"

It got old!

It was a pain!

The run-of-the-mill quack couldn't save them, but I could.

Can you understand the hardships of a genius?

You're free to respect me if you want.

But your disappointment is uncalled for.

If you can't forgive me as a doctor because I don't match your ideals,

then you never understood me to begin with, stupid reindeer!



Are you going to start lecturing me on medical ethics?!

I wouldn't dream of it!

I don't consider you a doctor!

What?!

The same goes for these zombies.

All you've done is reanimate the dead.

They aren't alive!

Don't take life so lightly!

You can be rather cruel.

They're moving right before your very eyes, and you think they aren't alive?

Yeah, you heard me!

Dr. Chopper, the "dead" are being given a second shot at life. It's a miracle!

Why would you want to reject these lives?

Behold!

Don't move.

Now start licking the floor, Cindry.

Okay, Hogback-sama.

Didn't you see that room, Dr. Chopper?

That is my room.

The numerous photos were of the stage actress Victoria Cindry before she died.

I had been in love with her for a very long time.

I wasn't the only one. Her beauty had charmed men from across the country.

There!

You're all set, Doctor.

S-S-Sorry! I shouldn't make a patient sew a button back on.

It's all right.

Thanks to you, I'll be able to go back on stage.

Thank you very much.

Father! Mother! Sorry to have kept you waiting.

Uh, excuse me...

Despite her popularity, she was down to earth.

She was close to her family...

She was kind to everyone... A truly wonderful woman.

But that woman...

...rejected my proposal, when my renown as a doctor

had let me obtain anything I wanted.

She already had a fiancé.

And shortly thereafter, I caught wind of some news that left me dumbfounded.

Cindry had died in an accident.

I felt drained.

I ultimately abandoned my work.

That is when he came. A giant man appeared before me.

It was my master, Gecko Moria!

Dr. Hogback, lend me a hand!

And I boarded this ship under the condition

that he would use his miraculous ability to resurrect Cindry!

I stole her body...

It was so easy to obtain the actress, Cindry, and bend her to my will!

Cindry-chan!

I wish plates would cease to exist.

Plates?!

The personality of the woman who had spurned me was of little consequence.

As long as she retained her beauty...

That is the zombie, Cindry-chan!

Of course I'm thrilled, but I'm sure she is as well!

She gets to live in this world as a human again.

How could you call her a human?

Make her stop licking the floor!

When a human's heart isn't linked to her body, she is no longer human!

By using corpses that can't stick up for themselves,

you're creating nothing but monsters!

For every zombie you create, you're making a person miserable!

I figured that out, which is why I can't forgive you guys!



Don't lecture me on life when you're a mediocre doctor, pirate reindeer!

Cindry-chan, finish those two off!

Okay.

I'm going to turn you guys into marios!

Rejoice, Dr. Chopper! Once you are dead,

I will make you my assistant, since you admire me so much.

Square Plate Blades!

One! Two! Three!

Stop it...!

Damn you!

Chopper!

Don't underestimate her just because she's a woman!

I've enhanced her muscles for combat.

You don't have to listen to that monster! Ow, ow, ow...

I will k*ll you!

You poor thing! And here you're already dead.

How would the family you left behind feel if they knew about this?

Let go of me!

If your family saw you covered in stitches

and being used as an expendable soldier,

it would tear them apart!

Let go of me!

The heart you were born and raised with is already dead,

but your body is being forced to do the bidding of others.

What the hell?!

Are you questioning your eyes? Face facts!

This is mankind's eternal dream! I've resurrected the dead!

The dead can come back to life!

Is the ability to move all that matters?

Humans are freer than that!

You're the one who treats them like they aren't humans!

Robin, hurry and feed her salt!

Right!

Dogguin! Jigoro! Help Cindry out!

Take out the pests!

I failed! Chopper!

Three-Sword Style...

... -Pound Phoenix!

Stop it, Zoro!

Doce Fleurs!

Not... her again!

Take out... the pests!

--Jerk! --Huh?

Why did you attack me along with them?! Don't be a pest!

Now you're asking for it!

That's how I feel!

The pests are supposed to get taken outside!

Then get going! He issued that order to me!

It was meant for me!

I just said he issued it to me!

Jerk!

Hey! What are you two doing?

Hey, knock it off! You need to actually work--

--Robin! --On it!

Isn't this turning out to be fascinating?

You ordered them to "take out the pests."

They are obediently trying to obey that order even as I speak.

I wonder what would happen if you didn't issue a new order.



Even without their memories, those two are still like water and oil...

Unbelievable.

Isn't this a rather tall tower?

Huh?

Why don't you order the two of us to jump out the window?

Robin...?

What's gotten into you?

I'll say that as many times as you like!

Jump! Jump! I want you to jump out the window together!

--Sure. --Huh?

No, not you! Wait!

Run faster! He wants us to jump out together.

Don't tell me what to do!

We don't want to.

I won't forget this!

You tricked me! You're horrible! You're the scum of all mankind!

Luffy will purify all of the zombies when he defeats Moria.

You're the one I want to throttle, Hogback!

C-C-Cindry! Buy me some time! I'm gonna run for the hills!

Where is my answer? I'll give you another shadow if they take you out.

Don't worry about dying!

What the--?!

I cannot...

move.

C-Cindry!

He's here! He's here!

Well, now you get to meet him...

...Straw Hat.

He's huge! This is my shadow?

So he has finally decided to submit to me!

Tell me: Who is your master?

My master is Moria-sama.

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Oars Roars! Come Out, Straw Hat Crew!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

Atta girl! You've finally returned to your senses, Cindry-chan!

Doce Fleurs!

Tsk!

Wait!

Like I'm gonna wait!

Wh-Why is the room shaking?!

Damn it! You're a pirate reindeer just pretending to be human!

How dare you side with a bunch of corpses?!

You aren't even human, you stinking monster!

A monster, a cyborg, a pervert, a guy with a long nose,

and a moss head follow my captain!

Unlike you guys, he doesn't have to boss around corpses

that can't speak for themselves!

Let go, freak!

Robin!

All right! I'm on it.

Pierna Fleurs!

Huh? What's going on?

What? What? What?!

W-W-Wait, Dr. Chopper! If I fall from this height and hit my head,

my genius noggin that is a gift to the world will crack open!

Are you okay with that?

I don't care!

The zombies are less rotten than the stuff between your ears!

Why don't you calm down a bit, Dr. Chopper?

Eat this! Robi-Cho Suplex!

He's twice the size of a giant.

So this is my zombie?

I've been waiting for you, Oars!

It looks like your shadow has finally settled into your body.

Have you become an obedient zombie?

Tell me! Who is your master?

My master is Moria-sama.

What?!

Hey, how could you say that?! Are you really my shadow?

Don't listen to this jerk!

Who are you, punk in the straw hat?

Let me present your commemorative first mission.

Look at the wanted posters attached to your arm!

Those ruffians are currently running amok on Thriller Bark.

They are the Straw Hat Crew!

Crush them mercilessly and toss them onto their ship!

I don't care if any of them die.

Those worth over million won't die if you squash them anyway.

Cut loose! Let me see the extent of your power.

Okay, Moria-sama.

Ah, there's one! It's Straw Hat!

Goodbye, Straw Hat!

You're running away?! You jerk!

Gum-Gum...

H-H-Hey, wait! That's dangerous!

...Bell!

What?!

What's that?

L-Luffy's zombie...!

Oars!

The floor is collapsing! Chopper, come over here!

Okay!

Huh?!

Ouch!

That was a close call.

This... is Luffy...

Hogback and Cindry fell down a floor.

Crap! This is heavy.

Cindry-chan, get this stone slab off of me!

C-Cindry-chan, hurry! Save me on the double!

Look! Oars is coming.

I... I can't get stepped on when I'm a genius!

Hey! Why are you just standing there?

I'm your master!

I... cannot move.

I... cannot move.

What?!

You're repeating that nonsense again?!

Your sense of loyalty is the only will zombies have!

Now save me already!

Your looks are all you have, you crappy corpse!

Hey! Hurry it up, Cindry!

Oars is coming!

Oars, look down! You imbecile!

It's me, you wretched ingrate!

I'm the one who modified your body so that you could move!

Whoa, whoa, whoa! What gives?! What gives?!

That last quake was way worse than any of the ones before it!

L-L-L... Luffy's zombie!

Hey, hey, hey, hey! What is making everything shake?!

What gives?!

No way! Is that Luffy's zombie?!

Crap!

Nami-san, seriously! This isn't the time to get your beauty sleep!

Screw it! I'm gonna have to run for now.

Huh? Nami-san?

Nami-san?

Wh-What?!

Nami-san vanished...

It couldn't be...!

It looks like the tables are turned.

Jerk! You're still alive?

Beast Man, show yourself!

It looks like we finally have control of this devil.

I've won! This time she will be my bride!

Damn it! Give Nami-san back!

Where the hell are you?!

Have him play with you! Enjoy the ultimate zombie!

Hey, did you feel that just now?

Yes, I did. It was so ominous that it made my hair stand on end.

Oh! But since I'm a skeleton, I don't have any hair!

Ah! I do have hair!

Punk! That's your precious afro! Don't forget about it!

Maybe you'd rather have a pompadour hairstyle!

--Uh, pass! --Come over here!

No, don't! Don't cut it!

What is that?

I'm getting goose bumps!

Oh! I'm a skeleton, so--

Gah! Something just popped out!

What is that?!

Th-That's... a zombie!

It's Luffy's zombie.

Look over there! Didn't Curly Cook come out with him?

Damn it!

Nami-san...

What is that stupid cook doing?

Wait!

Moria!

Are you going to chase after me no matter what?

I'm worried about that huge zombie,

but taking you down is the only way to recover everyone's shadows.

I won't let you escape!

Look! I am the last one laughing!

She sure is sound asleep.

Let's go elsewhere... and hold the ceremony... one more time,

my quiet bride!

Is Perona-sama all right?

She's unconscious!

I don't see any injuries.

Captain Kumacy and the Lieutenant were taken out! Curse Long Nose!

Get her out of here! This mansion is rottin' dangerous!

The Special Zombie will avenge them!

Things look rottin' bad! Get away from the mansion!

The Special Zombie is fighting!

Get rottin' far!

H-He's huge! I can see his head over the mansion.

Oh, crap!

Usopp!

Chopper! Robin!

W-W-We've got a problem!

O-O-Our wanted posters are a-attached to Zombie Luffy's arm!

I-I'm sure of it!

He is totally...

...coming after us!

Come out, Straw Hat Crew!

The freak! Is he trying to get in our way?

Darn it, Luffy! Are you going to crush your own crew?

Someone must have issued the order.

I hope the real Luffy is all right.

What is that?!

Can we take that monster down?

This should be fun.

Sanji!

He's insanely fast for someone so huge!

If he lands a solid hit, it could do serious damage!

Crap! What is he going to do to Sanji?

Hey, get back!

Don't underestimate me, monster!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Luffy Is the Enemy! The Ultimate Zombie vs. the Straw Hat Crew!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

Z-Zoro! Why are you on the roof?

Franky! And Brook's okay, too.

Scary! I'm scared! I can't fight that monster!

It looks like I should lend him a hand.

Now give back our shadows before the sun comes up!

At your current strength, you would have died if you continued your journey.

You're nowhere near strong enough to face the New World!

You seem to have a pretty decent crew...

...but you'd lose all of them.

Do you know why?

Hey, Straw Hat! You don't have time to chat!

Look at the sky! It's getting so bright.

Please get our shadows back already!

We're running out of time!

I found the answer through personal experience.

Why did I lose such infamous and skilled subordinates?

I lost my crew because they were alive!

But with undead zombies, I have nothing to lose!

Zombies are immortal!

They are unlimited soldiers that can be replaced if someone purifies them.

With my army of the dead, I shall fight to become King of the Pirates once more!



Consider yourselves fortunate that your shadows get to serve as my subordinates.

It stuck to me!

Come to me, all of the shadows on Thriller Bark!

Serve as my power!

Shadows Asgard!

Bro!

His shadow came out.

The shadows...!

No way...!

He's collecting all of the shadows on the island and absorbing them.

Straw Hat, I'd say you absorbed around shadows.

In that case, I'm absorbing ...

!

!

!

!

!

!

!

!

, shadows!

Darn it! Gosh darn it!

And here I thought we'd won!

But now he's , times bigger and stronger.

Size and strength don't mean squat!

I'll put everything I've got into taking him down!



I'm going back out onto the ocean!

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Our Bodies Vanish! The Morning Sun Shines on the Nightmarish Island!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!
