comment:
O-Oars is back on his feet!

I don't know what happened to Luffy, but he dealt plenty of damage.

Pierna Fleurs!

The weather forecast is rain!

Cool Ball!

Rain Tempo!

Crank it like mad!

I'm cranking it!

Here it comes! It's the Super Cold Cannon connected to the extra-large freezer!

Fire!

Now it's my turn!

Darn it!

Go!

Not a chain!

Be careful.

Third Gear!

Bone Balloon!

Zoro, push in Oars' stomach.

Three-Sword Style...

...Secret Technique!

Three Thousand Worlds!

Here goes nothing.

Gum-Gum...

...Giant Bazooka!

He did it!

Now go smack Moria awake and make him return our shadows.

The sun is almost up!

I don't need... a wakeup call.

Moria!

Straw Hat, how dare you trash my Thriller Bark?!

I lost my crew because they were alive!

But with undead zombies, I have nothing to lose!

Come to me, all of the shadows on Thriller Bark!

Serve as my power!

Shadows Asgard!

Bro!

!

!

!

!

!

!

!

!

, shadows!

"Our Bodies Vanish! The Morning Sun Shines on the Nightmarish Island!"

A thousand...

...shadows...

...are inside of Moria!

We're in a load of...

This can't be real.

We're doomed. What the heck is that?

I'm back to normal.

It's as good as dawn!

We're out of time!

Oars was a pushover for Straw Hat when he had shadows.

Since it's his power, he must have way better control of the ability!

Th-This is hopeless!

We've come too far for crap like this! It's not fair!

He even has Straw Hat's shadow.

Yeah.

I imagine he has ours as well.

They're all inside...

...of his stomach.

Right.

Run! This is a lost cause!

Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa!

He put a crack in the island!

The mansion attached to the mast is collapsing!

Run for it! Head for the forest!

It's over for real this time!

No! I'm gonna vanish! My body is gonna vanish!

Please save me!

Stupid! Hurry into the shadows.

The morning sun is coming through!

Make your way to the forest through the shadows!

Don't leave the buildings' shadows!

Captain Lola!

Captain Lola, what's keeping you? Hurry up!

Those guys...

They aren't the least bit fazed.

Do they still intend to win?

But all it took was one hit for him to put a crack in the island!

Right now, Moria is way more powerful than Oars ever was!



As long as they intend to fight, I'm not leaving this spot!

If we selfishly place our faith in him as the "Star of Hope"

and then split as soon as the going gets tough,

But this situation is hopeless!

I want you to escape.

As the captain, our obligation will be met if I stay behind.

Guys... Treasure your lives.

Captain Lola!

Captain Lola!

I don't care which way the coin flips.

I will never go back to hiding in the shadows!

Captain!

He's practically going berserk.

He doesn't have full control of the shadows.

It looks like anger and foolish pride made him overestimate himself.

Hey, guys. We're out of time.

I'm gonna push myself a bit.

Please take care of things after that!

Okay, you can count on us!

Send him flying!

Hey, you guys! What makes you think you stand a chance?

There is no way you'll win!

You're up against a monster that's a thousand strong!

Right! Stop and think for a second.

He even has your shadows!

He has your monstrous power!

If you're here to watch, shut your trap.

Moria plans to use his insane power to buy that brief period of time.

Second Gear!

Will we get obliterated first?

Or will Moria self-destruct first?

Go, Luffy!

Gum-Gum...

...Jet Rocket!

Look! The shadows are coming out.

Gum-Gum...

...Jet Bazooka!

Jet Bazooka! Jet Bazooka!

Gobs of shadows are being released!

Why are the shadows leaving if they're under his control?

Moria is losing control over them as he starts to black out.



Even Moria can't fully control a thousand shadows at once!

--Gum-Gum... --Brick Bat!

Black Box!

I'm trapped!

I'm going to crush you!

That was a direct hit!

It was just like the punch that put a crack in the island!

Straw Hat!

Stop it!

This is your baptism!

This is what happens when a whippersnapper

tries to act like a big shot on these waters!

This is what you get for defying one of the Seven Warlords!

H-He's cruel!

Know your place! The world is devised to crush anyone who stands out!

Luffy-san!

Luffy!

Luffy!

He got back up!

It doesn't matter if I'm a "whippersnapper"...

...or if I stand out!

No one...

...can...

...crush me!

No one can crush you?

Your ability to say that without any justification

proves just how green you are!

It's because I'm rubber.

In just a sec, I'm gonna make you spew out all of the shadows!

What's with him? Is he immortal?

He's incredible!

The morning light!

Crap!

Stupid! Get in the shadows or you're toast!

Help me! My hand is vanishing.

Hurry into the shadows! The courtyard isn't safe anymore.

Third Gear!

Bone Balloon!

Hey, is it wise to use that attack more than once?

Of course not!

Don't you remember what using Second Gear did to you that one time?

Use your Gum-Gum to sh**t yourself over here!

Once you're here, I'll carry you!

We're surrounded by the sea and a bunch of battleships!

If we stay here, we're gonna be k*lled!

I-I can't...

What?

My body... isn't moving at all.

Don't be ridiculous! You defeated the enemy!

We got Robin back, too! All that's left is for us to go back!

Please! Try hard!

This really is nuts, Luffy!

Your body can't take this!

Gum-Gum...

...Giant Jet Shell!

It's so powerful!

More shadows are coming out!

I won't let them escape! They're my minions!

Shadows, I am your sovereign!

That bastard! He doesn't plan on giving up our shadows.

My shadow!

Come back to me!

--Captain Lola! --Captain Lola!

Captain! Captain!

My shadow, can't you hear me?

We were always together, clear from the time I was born!

We came into this world together!

Come back to me!

I spent the past three years searching for the zombie that contained you!

Now you're in there, aren't you?

If you can hear me, come back! Come back!

Captain Lola!

Please hide in the shadows!

You're gonna turn to ash!

But... But it's k*lling me!

It's right there!

You're right! Supposedly all of our shadows are currently inside of Moria.

They're right in front of us!

We'll never get another chance like this!

But we're up against one of the Seven Warlords...

She's right... Come back!

Shadows, come back!

Come back!

Come back!!

Come back!

Come back! Come back! Come back!

I'd like to say something to my shadow, too.

If you want to become the King of the Pirates...

...you had better...

...stick with me!

Straw Hat, curse you...!

I dare you to go to the New World!

The real nightmare awaits you in the New World!

Our shadows are coming back!

We made it in time!

Here come our shadows!

H-Hey, guys!

Whoa!

Shadow, please hurry!

What the heck?!

No way!

Come on, guys!

W-Wait! What is going on?!

Didn't we take down Moria?!

Luffy!

It sounds like my fears were justified.

So it would seem.

Do not leave witnesses to testify that Straw Hat defeated Moria.

Annihilate the entire Straw Hat Crew!

That will be easy.

On the next episode of One Piece!

"Not Out of Danger Yet! Orders to Annihilate the Straw Hat Crew!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

comment:
Come on, guys!

What is going on?!

Didn't we take down Moria?!

Luffy!

"Not Out of Danger Yet! Orders to Annihilate the Straw Hat Crew!"

Hey, Zoro!

Robin!

Sanji!

Their bodies are vanishing!

Why?! Didn't we win?

Dang it! Were we too late?

They're vanishing!

Captain Lola!

Guys!

I thought we won, darn it!

"A Pirate Ship on the Grand Line"

DefaultLow,, , , ,,I don't believe it!

DefaultLow,, , , ,,Captain!

Please come to the deck, Captain!

Quit being stupid and hit the hay!

The morning light will fry you!

It's been two years since Moria stole our shadows. We'll never...

But Captain, please take a look at my feet!

Huh?

You have... a shadow!

I bet your shadow has also returned, Captain!

O-O-Our...

Our shadows are back!

It's everyone, Captain! All of our shadows have come back!

Captain, do you think someone defeated Moria?

No way! That's impossible.

He's so powerful that he went up against Kaido of the Four Emperors.

Who could possibly take out Moria?

"Somewhere in the West Blue on the Grand Line"

It's back! I have a shadow again!

How many years has it been since I've seen the light of day?

Our zombies in Thriller Bark finally kicked the bucket!

Yay! It's great!

Hurray!

We're free from Moria's curse!

Boss!

I can watch the sunrise!

Look! I have a shadow! It's following me!

I have a reflection! I can see myself in the mirror.

Hey! What was all that commotion about, Margarita?

My shadow! My shadow has come back.

What?! Your shadow has returned?

As in the shadow that was stolen by pirates ten years ago?

It's true...

Sir, I'm terribly sorry!

I was so surprised that I accidentally dropped your prized dishes!

It's true I had hard feelings towards plates, but I've reformed!

I didn't mean any harm.

I am really sorry. I will leave the manor immediately.

How could you say that?

I don't care about those plates!

Did you get hurt?

Really, this calls for a celebration!

This is truly wonderful, Margarita.

You must be so happy.

I am!

Isn't it great, Margarita?

Phew!

I'm very much alive.

For a second, I thought I was about to go to Heaven.

Sounds good to me! If we can go together, I'd love to go to Heaven!



This isn't funny, you jerks! We seriously thought you were dead.

You nearly vanished!

That was terrifying!

Goodness! That was bad for my heart.

Uh, not that I have a heart.

It's the morning sun!

I'm not afraid of the sunrise anymore!

I have a shadow!

I can kiss goodbye to life in the dark forest!

Hurray! Hurray!

It looks like all of them are okay, too.

We nearly ceased to exist when the morning light hit us,

but our bodies were fully restored when

our shadows returned just in the nick of time.

It's probably along the same lines of how Moria could alter a body's shape

by manipulating its shadow.

If I make his shadow round...

...Oars will turn into a ball!

Oars Ball!

All I know is that our bodies and shadows have to match.

Relax! This is the only time we're ever gonna have the fun

of losing our shadows.

Anyway, I'm just glad we didn't lose anyone...

All of a sudden, I feel totally wiped out.

There any cola around here?

All of the strange creatures and phenomena we've seen since coming ashore

were nothing more than a ruse put on by Moria.

Now that he has been defeated, there is nothing left on this island.

Just like waking from a nightmare in the morning, everything has vanished.

I swear, this was one nasty haunted mansion!

Hey! Hey! Wake up, Absalom!

Come on, Absalom!

Hey, get up!

Lola!

Knock it off! I'm not going to marry you!

Don't make a scene!

She has already lost her shadow.

Hogback?

For the record, what happened to me?

I have no idea what happened to you!

I'd wager someone defeated you. Pathetic!

But more importantly, I have bad news about Moria-sama...

What?!

Straw Hat defeated Moria-sama?!

Shh! Not so loud! Lower the volume!

You're being loud!

Why are you so riled up, Hogback? You should be called Rileback.

Thriller Bark is of no use to me now,

but I don't plan on spending the rest of my days as a loser.

What do you want to do?

Well...

Didn't Luffy shrink back there?

He told me that after he uses the Giant Gear,

his body shrinks for however long he used that gear.

Don't you think Luffy's new fighting style is too hard on his body?

I'm worried...

If the enemies waiting ahead of us only continue to get stronger,

he's gonna keep pushing himself!

We need to pull our own weight better.

You're right.

Whoa, a zombie!

One of them still has its shadow!

No, I'm a severely injured old man.

That's confusing! Just pass yourself off as a zombie!

Aren't you the old man we met at the graveyard?

I can't believe it! I never dreamed I would

see the day I could walk under the sun again.

Thank you! How can I ever repay you?

Hey! Grandpa Spoil!

Gramps!

Honorary President of the Victim Association!

Oh, guys! So you pulled through?

Gramps, are you all right?

Yeah!

You know each other?

Oh! Come to think of it, we still haven't thanked you.

We're grateful from the bottom of our hearts!

Sorry for all the trouble we've caused you.

When we saw all the mayhem you caused,

we figured if you couldn't do it, no one could!

Thank you, guys.

No one in Thriller Bark's Victim Association...

...will ever forget the debt we owe you!

Thank you very much!

If there is anything you'd like, please say the word!

There isn't much, but we have some food reserves.

Better yet, you're welcome to marry me!

--We'll pass! --Five men turned her down all at once!

She's been rejected , times!

You really don't need to thank us...

Don't say that!

Remember what Luffy said, Gramps?

--I'm especially interested in you! --We simply fought to suit our own needs.

--Will you marry me? --We just saved you while we were at it.



How could you say that?! They actually want to thank us!

Yeah! You should listen to her, Bro!

Let us do something for you!

We don't care if you saved us on the side or not!

We're grateful that you defeated Moria.

I know, right?

Uh, your eyes...

I know! Why don't you swipe all of Moria's treasure?

We'll load it onto your ship for you!

Oh, it's already on...

Oh, yeah! I forgot about something important!

What is it?

I had totally forgotten about him...

What's the matter?

We've got a problem!

I see...

It sounds as though my fears were justified.

So it would seem.

Who is that?

There he is...

Everyone, remain calm and hear me out.

During our fight with Moria...

...I forgot to mention this.

There is one more member on this island...

...of the Seven Warlords!

Wha--?!

What did you say?!

That's a...

...w*rlord?!

Th-That's messed up!

What are two of the Seven Warlords doing on the same island?!

We have finally found a replacement for Crocodile.

It would look bad if another one of the Seven Warlords needed to be replaced.

Is he still breathing, even if barely?

I don't know.

If he is still alive, I would like to wait for his recovery

and let him retain his position as one of the Seven Warlords for a while.

We can take further measures later.

If we lose one w*rlord after the next, the title will cease to demand respect.

This information must not get out to the public.

I swear, those pirates cause nothing but trouble.

I recognize him!

Nearly as large as Moria, that pirate was called the "Tyrant."

He's Bartholomew Kuma!

That's Tyrant Kuma?!

You mean the pirate whose cruelty knows no bounds?!

You understand what I'm saying, don't you?

Do not leave witnesses to testify that Straw Hat defeated Moria.

The World Government is assigning you a special mission:



Annihilate everyone on the island, including the Straw Hat Crew.

That will be easy.

I just heard something!

H-He just said "annihilate."

Whoa, wait! Is he gonna annihilate...

...all of us?! Why?!

Give me a break!

We just got free from Moria's power!

No way! We can't fight two Warlords in a row!

It took all we had just to defeat Moria.

Guys, get back! I'll take him on!

Be careful! He uses some sort of power!

I saw someone vanish when he touched her with his hand.

Negative Ghost!

And Special Hollow!

Th-The people he touches vanish?!

S-Scary!

And he can also warp.

Aren't you the Cat Burglar?

You're part of the Straw Hat Crew!

Is it true that Monkey D. Luffy has an older brother?

Eh?!

What gives?! He got up there in the blink of an eye!

We've got a freak on our hands!

His hands... are dangerous!

What?!

He's here!

He's huge!

When'd he get down here?!

I see. I'd definitely call that warping.

Damn it! We were finally set free!

There is no way I'm gonna die here!

Right! I'll never let someone stand between us and our voyage ever again!

Guys, get him!

Yeah, you heard them!

Let's get him!

Stop, men! You don't stand a chance!

He pierced through the whole group without even touching all of them...

D-Darn it!

Pirate Hunter Zoro...

I will start with you.

What is with the padding on the palms of his hands?!

It repels all of my att*cks!

It is my ability. Your time's up.

"When it rains, it pours."

I accept your challenge!

If I die, then that shows the limit of my ability.

On the next episode of One Piece!

"It Repels Everything! Kuma's Paw-Paw Power!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!

Robin!

Sanji!

Their bodies are vanishing!

Why?! Didn't we win?

Dang it! Were we too late?

Phew! I'm very much alive.

Guys, get him!

Yeah, you heard them!

Let's get him!

Stop, men! You don't stand a chance!

Pirate Hunter Zoro...

I will start with you.

"It Repels Everything! Kuma's Paw-Paw Power!"

Hey! Stay with me!

Are you gonna make it?

What did that scumbag do?!

He didn't even touch the guys to pierce them with something!

Is that his ability?

This is beyond cruel!

After many long years under Moria's reign in the dark forest,

we only get a moment of happiness before another w*rlord appears

That's low, dagnabbit!

You know good and well that the Straw Hats just finished a fierce battle!

You might be too much for us, but we have the energy to take you on!

I don't care if you're a w*rlord!

Compared to Oars and Moria, you don't look so big!

I'll accept the challenge. I don't need backup.

Don't make me look bad!

You and your crewmates have earned quite the reputation.

It's said that Straw Hat Luffy has several skilled subordinates on his ship.

Well, well, well! But it's true, it's true!

This is no time for all of you to act flattered!

You have stirred up trouble in various places.

Your captain was not the only one to make a name for himself over time.

Hey, Zoro! Wait! This is totally nuts!

You're battered and bruised clear to the bone!

The world is designed so that when it rains trouble, it pours.

If I start making excuses, will someone come rescue us?

If I die, then that shows the limit of my ability!

Two-Sword Style...

...Sword Draw...

...Rashomon!

What was that?!

Look! He hasn't even done anything and Zoro's breathing heavy!

What is that guy's ability?!

What's with the mark he keeps leaving in the debris?

Look at the palm of his hand!

A-A paw?!

What is that doing on a human's hand?!

Thirty-six Pound Phoenix!

Look out!

He repelled Zoro's attack with his bare hand!

Is that even possible?

Is that your ability?

I have the power to repel various things.

I am a paw man, having eaten the Paw-Paw Fruit.

A-A p-paw man?

--Huh? --Why does that sound so peaceful?!

Are there soothing Devil Fruits?!

It's hard to say whether you're a w*rlord or a Purr-lord...

Maybe he's not such a big deal after all.

Franky...!

Franky!

Cyborg Franky, is that the extent of your strength?

Franky, breathe!

Breathe, Franky!

Franky... got blasted away from the front!

That attack is incredible.

He might be repelling air.

A normal cannon wouldn't hurt Franky.

It's called "Pad Cannon." When air is repelled at the speed of light,

it creates a shock wave that can sh**t through people.

Your time is up.

Thrust Pad Cannon!

Streaming Wolf-Swords!

--Zoro! --He got repelled with his attack!

Curse you...

He's in trouble! He can't keep this up!

It's a miracle he's fought for as long as he has!

As it is, that behemoth Oars nearly beat the life out of him!

Zoro, behind you! Run!

Zoro!

That's as far as you go!

Concasser!

Sanji!

He didn't repel that with his paws!

I bet Sanji cracked your skull, you bastard!

Jerk! Stay out of this!

Black Foot Sanji...

So that would be you.

Sanji's kick didn't even faze him.

What's going on here?!

Why is he so hard?! Is his face made out of iron?

F-Firebird Star!

King of sn*pers...

What a presumptuous title.

Huh?

This is too much for them! They don't stand a chance.

They're gonna get k*lled!

Zoro! Sanji!

As I feared, I will not derive pleasure from k*lling you

while you are in this weakened state.

The government ordered me to annihilate everyone, but...

What is that supposed to be?

Air? Is he condensing the air with his paws?

The bubble is getting smaller!

He's applying pressure to a large body of air by repelling it with his paws!

That's making it shrink!

When all of that air depressurizes, it will generate power!

The giant sonic blast it creates will be like a b*mb.

Wh-What?!

A b*mb?

In other words, he's making a b*mb?!

A... b*mb?!

I will spare your lives.

In exchange, all you need to do is hand over Straw Hat Luffy's head.

As long as I get his head, the government will not complain.

You want us to sell out our friend?

Now then, give Straw Hat to me.

Forget it!!

What a pity.

Ursus Shock!

Stay out of this, Moss Head! I'm taking Kuma down!

No, you're staying out of this!

You jerk... Why did you...?

You're the cook.



It's the warrior's job to risk his life in combat.

On the next episode of One Piece!

"The Pain of My Crewmates Is My Pain! Zoro's Desperate Fight!"

I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!!
